Su in 2nd. As per Bhrigu sutram sun in
2nd should cause some opposing decision from Govt at
the age of25. (1969+25=1995). Means your Asc is Cp.
5) As per Chamathkara Chintamani Su in 2nd should give
some trouble with wife in the Desa of Su. If 4.30 is taken
Su dasa starts in 1998 July and if 6.30 is taken Su dasa
starts in 1997 Feb. Therefore the correct birth time should
be somewhere between the two given timings, may be
somewhere near to the midpoint (5.30 ?).
6) As per Bhrigu sutram if Ju in 9th, at the age of 35 you
should go for a pilgrimage. (1969+35=2004). Means your
Asc is Cp. (You came to India on that year)
From the above facts it is clear that your Asc is Cp. As per
your mother's opinion the BT is after4.30, andAsc will remain
Cp only till 5.30. Therefore now I am sure that your BT is
somewhere between 4.30 AM and 5.30 AM I feel relaxed as
the BT window is compressed to I hour.
